name: SliceShow

values.name: init
values.comment: Init Model from the list of slides
values.type: List (Slide a b) -> Config a b

values.name: setSubscriptions
values.comment: Set inputs for the custom content
values.type: (a -> Sub b) -> Config a b -> Config a b

values.name: setUpdate
values.comment: Set update for the custom content
values.type: (b -> a -> ( a, Cmd b )) -> Config a b -> Config a b

values.name: setView
values.comment: Set view for the custom content
values.type: (a -> Html b) -> Config a b -> Config a b

values.name: show
values.comment:
Start the SliceShow with your `slides`:
app = show (init slides)
main = app.html
port tasks : Signal (Task.Task Never ())
port tasks = app.tasks
values.type: Config a b -> Program Never (Model a b) (Message b)

name: SliceShow.Slide
comment:
This module helps you define a slide
@docs Slide, slide, setDimensions

values.name: setDimensions
values.type: ( Int, Int ) -> Slide a b -> Slide a b

values.name: slide
values.comment: Create new 1024x640 slide from a list of content items
values.type: List (Content a b) -> Slide a b

name: SliceShow.Content
comment:
This module helps you define Slide content
@docs Content, item, container, custom, hide

values.name: container
values.type: (List (Html b) -> Html b) -> List (Content a b) -> Content a b

values.name: hide
values.type: Content a b -> Content a b
